transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY into the interim Keys table from N_GL_REV_MEASURE

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA  GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE GL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched keys between N_INV_REV_MEASURE and keys table into work interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA  INV,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE INV.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY_TA WI_KEY WHERE INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_MT_BILLTO_CUSTPRTY_HIER_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the data from WD0 snapshot dimension tables to Tax Audit Dimension tables

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BCST.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BCST.CUSTOMER_TYPE,
BCST.BRANCH_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
BCST.BRANCH_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
BCST.BRANCH_OUT_OF_BUSINESS_FLG, 
BCST.BRANCH_SITE_CEO_TITLE,
BCST.BRANCH_SITE_CEO_NAME,
BCST.ORGANIZATION_PARTY_TYPE,
BCST.BRANCH_LOCATOR_KEY,
BCST.HQ_LOCATOR_KEY,
BCST.GU_LOCATOR_KEY,
BCST.BRANCH_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD,
BCST.HQ_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD,
BCST.GU_CMMRCL_BIZ_CNCL_SGMT_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_PRIMARY_NAME, 
BCST.BRANCH_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
BCST.HQ_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY, 
BCST.HQ_PRIMARY_NAME,
BCST.HQ_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
BCST.GU_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
BCST.GU_PRIMARY_NAME,
BCST.GU_COMPANY_TARGET_ID_INT,
BCST.BRANCH_SIC_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
BCST.BRANCH_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT, 
BCST.BRANCH_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
BCST.BRANCH_DUNS_NUM, 
BCST.BRANCH_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_VMS_DETAIL_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_VMS_TOP_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_STATUS_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,
BCST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
BCST.BRANCH_HQ_BRANCH_CD, 
BCST.BRANCH_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
BCST.BRNCH_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
BCST.BRANCH_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
BCST.HQ_SIC_CD,
BCST.HQ_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT, 
BCST.HQ_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT,
BCST.HQ_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT, 
BCST.HQ_DUNS_NUM,
BCST.HQ_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD, 
BCST.HQ_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
BCST.HQ_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
BCST.HQ_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
BCST.HQ_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD, 
BCST.HQ_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
BCST.HQ_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
BCST.HQ_VMS_DETAIL_CD,
BCST.HQ_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD, 
BCST.HQ_VMS_TOP_CD,
BCST.HQ_STATUS_CD, 
BCST.HQ_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT,
BCST.GU_SIC_CD, 
BCST.GU_SITE_EMPLOYEE_CNT,
BCST.GU_YEAR_ESTABLISHED_INT, 
BCST.GU_ANNUAL_REVENUE_USD_AMT,
BCST.GU_DUNS_NUM, 
BCST.GU_CUST_MKT_SEGMENT_CD,
BCST.GU_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, 
BCST.GU_SUPER_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
BCST.GU_VMS_DETAIL_CD, 
BCST.GU_VMS_SUBGROUP_CD,
BCST.GU_VMS_TOP_CD, 
BCST.GU_STATUS_CD,
BCST.GU_PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT, 
BCST.GU_RECOGNIZED_FLG,
BCST.GU_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD, 
BCST.GU_PRNT_CUST_MKT_SGMT_V2_CD,
BCST.GU_LEGAL_STATUS_CD, 
BCST.DV_CSC_CMPNY_SUPER_SLS_CHNL_CD,
BCST.DV_CSC_COMPANY_NAME, 
BCST.BRANCH_CITY_NAME,
BCST.BRANCH_STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME,
BCST.BRANCH_POSTAL_CD, 
BCST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
BCST.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
BCST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
BCST.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
BCST.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT 
FROM	
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_BILLTO_CUSTPRTY_HIER_TA_WD0 BCST,$$STGDB.WI_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY_TA WI_KEY
WHERE BCST.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=WI_KEY.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
